description: Multiple directory traversal vulnerabilities in TuMusika Evolution 1.7R5 allow remote attackers to include and execute arbitrary local files via a .. (dot dot) in the language parameter to (1) languages_n.php, (2) languages_f.php, or (3) languages.php in inc/; and (4) allow remote attackers to read arbitrary local files via a .. (dot dot) in the uri parameter to frames/nogui/sc_download.php.
